**Google Ads – Legal Services Industry**

---

**CLIENT PROFILE**

**Industry:** Legal Services  
**Market Type:** Local / Regional Search  
**Service Provided:** Google Ads (PPC)  
**Campaign Duration:** 30 Days

A law firm operating in a competitive legal services market partnered with MD Astra to improve paid search performance and drive consistent, high-intent legal inquiries through Google Ads.

---

**PRIMARY OBJECTIVE**

To generate a significant increase in qualified legal leads while ensuring Google Ads spend was fully trackable, conversion-focused, and aligned with real client-acquisition outcomes.

---

**BUSINESS CHALLENGE**

Prior to working with MD Astra, the legal services business faced common industry-wide challenges:

• Paid traffic was not converting into meaningful client inquiries  
• Google Ads campaigns lacked proper conversion tracking and attribution  
• Generic landing pages failed to align with legal search intent  
• No visibility into which keywords or ads generated revenue  
• Minimal ongoing optimization, resulting in inefficient ad spend

As a result, Google Ads functioned as a cost center rather than a predictable growth channel.

---

**MD ASTRA STRATEGY**

MD Astra implemented a conversion-first Google Ads framework designed specifically for high-intent legal search behavior.

**Strategic Approach**

• Built practice-area–focused campaigns for core legal services such as Family Law, Business Law, and Wills & Estates  
• Developed service-specific landing pages with clear CTAs, trust signals, and credibility markers  
• Implemented full conversion tracking using Google Tag Manager and GA4 to capture form submissions and phone calls  
• Conducted deep keyword and competitor research to isolate high-intent legal searches  
• Added negative keywords to eliminate irrelevant traffic (e.g., job-related searches)

---

**EXECUTION**

Once Google Ads account was restructured:

• Budgets were concentrated on high-intent legal search terms  
• Ad messaging was aligned with urgency, legal need, and user intent  
• Low-performing queries and ads were paused early  
• Continuous A/B testing was conducted on ad copy and landing pages  
• Bidding strategies were optimized toward Maximize Conversions

All optimization decisions were driven strictly by conversion performance rather than impressions or clicks.

---

**Remarkable Results**

![][image1]

**RESULTS (30-DAY PERFORMANCE)**

| Metric | Before Optimization | After Optimization (30 Days) |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Total Leads | 1 | 108 |
| Phone Calls | Minimal | 16 |
| Clicks | 862 | 2,383 |
| Impressions | 29.5K | 205K |
| Ad Spend | $588 | $4,851 |

**Key Outcomes**

• Lead volume scaled from near-zero to over 100 qualified legal inquiries within 30 days  
• High-intent searches such as “family lawyer near me” and “business contract lawyer” became primary conversion drivers  
• Lead quality improved through tighter targeting and service-level messaging  
• Google Ads transitioned into a predictable and scalable lead-generation channel

---

**CONCLUSION**

This case study highlights how MD Astra helps legal services businesses transform underperforming Google Ads accounts into scalable client-acquisition systems.

By focusing on intent-driven campaign structure, service-specific landing experiences, and disciplined optimization, MD Astra delivers measurable, repeatable growth for competitive service-based industries.
